name: First Cash Pawn
description_short: FirstCash is the leading international pawn shop operator with 3,300+ locations across the U.S., UK, and Latin America, offering pawn loans, retail sales, and gold buying services.
description_long:
FirstCash, Inc. is headquartered in Fort Worth, Texas and operates as the leading international operator of pawn stores with over 3,300 retail locations. The company was founded to serve cash and credit-constrained consumers who need fast access to funds or affordable merchandise. FirstCash maintains a significant presence across 29 U.S. states and the District of Columbia, plus international operations in the United Kingdom, Mexico, Guatemala, Colombia, and El Salvador. The company employs approximately 22,000 people globally and is listed as a component company in both the S&P MidCap 400 Index and the Russell 2000 Index.

FirstCash's primary service is providing non-recourse pawn loans secured by pledged personal property, meaning customers are not personally liable if they default on the loan. Beyond lending, the company operates retail pawn stores that buy and sell a wide variety of items including jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, and musical instruments. FirstCash also offers layaway services with 10% down payment plans, gold and precious metal buying services, and retail sales of merchandise. Through its wholly owned subsidiary AFF, the company also provides lease-to-own and retail finance payment solutions through over 15,000 merchant partner locations nationwide.

What distinguishes FirstCash is its massive scale as the leading operator in the pawn industry, combined with its technology-driven approach to point-of-sale payment solutions. The company's geographic reach—spanning multiple countries and 29 U.S. states—provides accessibility and convenience to customers across diverse markets. Their focus on serving both cash-constrained and credit-constrained consumers without requiring traditional credit checks makes them an alternative to conventional banking for emergency liquidity needs. The breadth of merchandise categories they accept also sets them apart from smaller, specialized pawn operations.

FirstCash is best suited for consumers who need immediate cash and have valuable personal property to pledge as collateral, or those seeking affordable merchandise through retail sales or layaway plans. The pawn loan structure offers genuine benefits: fast funding, no credit checks, and no recourse liability. However, consumers should understand that pawn loans require surrendering possession of items, interest costs apply, and default results in loss of the pledged property. This is fundamentally a collateral-based lending solution, not a substitute for traditional personal loans or credit-building products.
pros: Massive network of 3,300+ locations provides convenient access across 29 U.S. states and international markets
Non-recourse pawn loans mean no personal liability if you cannot repay—only lose the pledged item
No credit check required; serves credit-constrained consumers who cannot access traditional loans
Fast cash funding—loans are processed quickly with collateral in hand
Diverse merchandise acceptance (jewelry, electronics, tools, instruments, appliances, sporting goods)
Layaway service available with only 10% down, providing affordable payment options for purchases
Gold and precious metals buying services offer immediate cash for items most people already own
Publicly traded company (S&P MidCap 400, Russell 2000) indicates financial stability and transparency
cons: Pawn loans are not credit-building; missed payments result in loss of personal property with no recourse debt protection benefit
Effective interest rates on pawn loans can be high when annualized, and storage/handling fees may apply
You must surrender physical possession of items for the duration of the loan, creating inconvenience and risk of loss
Limited to consumers with valuable pledgeable collateral; those without valuable items cannot access loans
Retail merchandise selection varies by location and inventory availability is unpredictable
best_for: Individuals with valuable personal property (jewelry, electronics, instruments) who need immediate emergency cash
Credit-constrained or unbanked consumers unable to qualify for traditional personal loans or credit products
Budget shoppers seeking affordable merchandise or layaway purchase options without credit approval
People needing short-term liquidity who can afford to pledge collateral and repay within the loan term
diagnosis: FirstCash is best for consumers in genuine financial emergencies who have valuable collateral to pledge and can repay within a reasonable timeframe. The main caveat is that pawn loans are not credit-building solutions, require surrendering physical possession of items, and carry real risk of permanent loss if you cannot repay—they should be considered a last resort for fast cash, not a substitute for traditional lending products.
services: Pawn loans secured by personal property with non-recourse terms
Retail sales of jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, and musical instruments
Gold, silver, and platinum buying services with immediate cash payment
Layaway purchase plans with 10% down payment option
In-store merchandise inventory browsing and shopping
Store locator tool for finding nearest FirstCash location
Lease-to-own and retail finance payment solutions through AFF subsidiary (15,000+ merchant partners)
Point-of-sale payment technology solutions for consumer lending
Consumer lending focused on cash and credit-constrained populations
Online FAQ and pawn education resources
